title: Cheese-Pull Filipino Lentils Stew
description: Herbal, comforting Filipino lentils stew with a creamy cheese pull, made in a Dutch oven for a macrobiotic-friendly dinner.
instructions: Heat the Dutch oven over medium heat and add olive oil.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, smoked paprika, cumin, and oregano, cooking for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add diced red bell pepper and sliced carrot, cooking for 2 minutes while stirring.
Pour in the dry lentils, vegetable broth, and tomato paste, bringing the mixture to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let the stew simmer for 20 minutes, or until lentils are tender.
Stir in soy sauce and lemon juice, adjusting seasoning with salt and pepper.
Lower the heat, sprinkle shredded cheddar over the top, and cover loosely to allow the cheese to melt.
Once the cheese has melted and pulled, remove from heat.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh herbs.
